summary: Tested 'Historial de Auditoría de Insumos' feature. All 7 backend tests passed. UI verified: Auditoría tab visible in tabs, golden header with stats, filter by name/date/field works, table shows all columns with red/green color coding, Export button present.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ingredients/audit-logs/all returns logs and stats
Backend: Filter by ingredient_name works with partial match (case-insensitive)
Backend: Filter by field_changed returns only logs for that field
Backend: Filter by date range (start_date, end_date) works
Backend: Audit log structure has all required fields (timestamp, changed_by_name, ingredient_name, field_changed, old_value, new_value)
Backend: Updating ingredient conversion_factor creates audit log
Frontend: Auditoría tab visible in InventoryManager tabs
Frontend: Header shows 'Historial de Auditoría de Insumos' with golden gradient style
Frontend: Stats cards show Total de Cambios, Insumos Afectados, Tipos de Campo
Frontend: 'Exportar Historial' button visible in header
Frontend: Filters section has Nombre del Insumo, Fecha Inicio, Fecha Fin, Campo Editado
Frontend: Campo Editado dropdown shows all field options
Frontend: Table columns: Fecha y Hora, Usuario, Insumo, Campo Editado, Valor Anterior, Valor Nuevo
Frontend: Valor Anterior displayed in red background
Frontend: Valor Nuevo displayed in green background
Frontend: Filter by ingredient name shows filtered results with updated stats
seed_data_creation: Used existing audit logs from previous testing sessions. Created TEST_Audit_Ingredient during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit History feature fully working. Key endpoint: GET /api/ingredients/audit-logs/all with filters: ingredient_name (partial match), start_date, end_date, field_changed. Returns {logs: [], stats: {total_changes, unique_ingredients, changes_by_field}}. Frontend audit tab accessible via Config > Inventario > Stock > Abrir Inventario > Auditoría tab. Export button uses xlsx library to generate Excel file.

features: Header with golden gradient shows title and stats
Search filters: ingredient name, date range, field type
Red/green color coding for old/new values

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
